channel.title: Command-Line-Tool on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Command-Line-Tool on Arrans github.io

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: Maxteabag/sqlit
item.description: A user friendly TUI for SQL databases. Written in python. Supports SQL server, Mysql, PostreSQL, SQLite, Turso and more.

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: Syllo/nvtop
item.description: GPU & Accelerator process monitoring for AMD, Apple, Huawei, Intel, NVIDIA and Qualcomm

item.title: veeso/termscp
item.description: 🖥 A feature rich terminal UI file transfer and explorer with support for SCP/SFTP/FTP/S3/SMB

item.title: nao1215/sqly
item.description: executes SQL against CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Microsoft Excel™ , ACH, and Fedwire files with shell.
